scope_note: This school does not yet have a source-backed per-major enrollment breakdown in Goal Kicker. This panel shows the structured undergraduate majors inventory currently stored in the knowledgebase.

summary.count_method: counted extracted undergraduate-major titles from an official page

notes: Official Baylor majors pages on admissions.web.baylor.edu and go.web.baylor.edu were Cloudflare-blocked in this environment, and the official undergraduate catalog root returned an empty 202 response during this audit.; titles extracted from official page: https://www.baylor.edu/
